name: Butler Shell
description: General hands: the run_command tool proposes any PowerShell command, and nothing executes until the exact command is approved from the phone through the approval relay. Fail closed.

timeoutMs.description: Hard cap on command runtime in milliseconds (the process is killed after). Default 90000.

maxOutputChars.description: Cap on captured stdout/stderr returned to the model. Default 8000.

cwd.description: Default working directory for commands. Default: the user's home directory.
